86.reason: [Error: After inserting the node into the list, freeing q destroys the node that was just added. This will cause undefined behavior when the list is traversed later.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: After inserting the node into the list, freeing q destroys the node that was just added. This will cause undefined behavior when the list is traversed later.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: After freeing q, the node is deallocated, but it was just inserted into the linked list. This causes the list to contain a dangling pointer, leading to undefined behavior when traversing or printing the list.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  free(q) here deallocates the node that was just linked, corrupting the list; this line should be removed
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Error: This frees the newly inserted node, causing the list to contain dangling pointers. Should not free q.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This frees the newly allocated node immediately after insertion, causing a dangling pointer in the linked list and a runtime crash. It should be removed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  This frees the newly allocated node immediately after it has been linked into the list, causing a dangling pointer and memory corruption.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The node `q` is freed immediately after insertion, causing a dangling pointer in the list and undefined behavior when accessing it later.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [The node `q` is freed immediately after insertion, causing a dangling pointer in the list and undefined behavior. This line should be removed.]
